completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part; primary type backend; confirmed by user

Completed exhaustive conditional analysis for API endpoints, runtime data models, UI assets, state/status analysis, config/env handling, display/layout logic, and iTerm2 backend integration

Generated single-part architecture documentation covering HTTP API, WebSocket updates, service orchestration, analyzer, display logic, backend abstraction, and static dashboard
Wrote supporting docs: project overview, source tree analysis, component inventory, development guide, API contracts, and data models
Generated master documentation index with links to all generated and pre-existing docs
Validated generated documentation, confirmed no incomplete markers in docs/index.md, and finalized workflow output
